title: Care Assistant
subtitle: Ask about caregiving, medications, or health
intro: Ask me questions about caregiving, medications, or health management. I can help with appointments, medications, adherence, and recent activity.
disclaimer: AI responses are for informational purposes only. Always consult healthcare professionals. To protect privacy, no personal health details are sent to the AI.

errors.subscriptionRequired: The Care Assistant is a premium feature. Upgrade to Premium to use it.
errors.rateLimited: You've reached your daily limit of 50 questions. Please try again tomorrow.
errors.unavailable: The Care Assistant is unavailable right now. Please try again later.
errors.sendFailed: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.
